channel.title: Problem Set Solutions on MIT OpenCourseWare
channel.description: Recent content in Problem Set Solutions on MIT OpenCourseWare

item.title: Problem Set 1 — Solutions
item.description: Solutions to a problem set on writing, compiling, and debugging C programs, preprocessor macros, the C ﬁle structure, variables, functions and program statements, and returning from functions.

item.title: Problem Set 2 — Solutions
item.description: Solutions to a problem set on programming in C, data types, operators, and expressions.

item.title: Problem Set 3 — Solutions
item.description: Solutions to a poblem set on programming in C, control ﬂow, functions, variable scope, static and global variables, I/O, printf and scanf, file I/O, character arrays, error handling, labels, and goto.

item.title: Problem Set 4 — Solutions
item.description: Solutions to a problem set on programming in C, pointers, arrays, strings, and searching and sorting algorithms.

item.title: Problem Set 5 — Solutions
item.description: Solutions to a problem set on programming in C, linked lists, and binary trees.

item.title: Problem Set 6: Part 1 — Solutions
item.description: Solutions to a problem set on programming in C, pointers to pointers, multidimensional arrays, stacks, and queues.

item.title: Problem Set 6: Part 2 — Solutions
item.description: Solutions to a problem set on function pointers and hash tables.

item.title: Problem Set 7 Solutions
item.description: Solution files to a problem set on programming in C, using and creating libraries, B-trees, and priority queues. (This ZIP file contains: 5 .txt files and 5 .c files.)
